text.title: Prompt Techniques — Failure Modes
text.summary: 5 known failure modes when running advanced prompting in production. Each carries symptom / root-cause / fix.

failure-mode.description: Meta-prompt output is hyper-tuned to one model (gpt-4o) and degrades when copied to gpt-4o-mini or Claude.
failure-mode.detector: A/B vs source model: lift > 10%; A/B vs target model: regression > 5%.
failure-mode.repair: Generate the meta-prompt against the deploy model, not a stronger one. Add a "verify on target model" gate before promotion.

failure-mode.description: PromptChain step N fails; steps 1..N-1 already wrote to external state; downstream sees inconsistent partial output.
failure-mode.detector: Chain log shows write-then-fail trace; row count after run != expected.
failure-mode.repair: Move side-effects out of the chain. Chain steps only transform; a sink stage commits transactionally after the chain completes.

failure-mode.description: Golden set drift — the test data is stale and no longer reflects production distribution; eval_score lies.
failure-mode.detector: Production accuracy < eval_score by >10% on the same prompt.
failure-mode.repair: Refresh golden set quarterly from production samples (with human relabel). Version the golden set; ties eval_score to a specific snapshot id.

failure-mode.description: Prompt promoted to production without A/B; quality silently drops.
failure-mode.detector: PromptLibrary entry has new `version` but no preceding `ab_record_id`.
failure-mode.repair: CI gate: any PromptLibrary version bump requires an attached A/B run with eval_score ≥ baseline – 1%. PR is blocked otherwise.

failure-mode.description: Delimiter collision — content contains the same delimiter (```), the model misreads section boundaries; output corrupts.
failure-mode.detector: Output truncated at a content-internal triple-backtick.
failure-mode.repair: Use XML tags with rare, descriptive names (`<document>`, `<question>`); never reuse backticks as delimiter for code-bearing content.

section.title: Prompt-injection markers
section.p: Documents inserted into multi-part prompts are DATA. XML tag boundaries are the model's strongest cue for what is instruction vs content. Never let user input escape into the instruction section unfiltered.

section.title: Human checkpoint
section.p: Promoting a meta-prompt-generated PromptLibrary version to production requires sign-off by a named engineer who has reviewed the prompt body and the A/B record.
